name: Battlin' Boxing Cross Counter
name_jp: バーニングナックル・クロスカウンター
desc:
When your opponent activates a monster effect: Destroy 1 "Battlin' Boxer" or "Number" Xyz Monster you control, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, destroy that monster, then you can apply the following effect.
● Special Summon 1 "Battlin' Boxer" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck with a different name than the first monster, and if you do, attach this card to it as material.
You can only activate 1 "Battlin' Boxing Cross Counter" per turn.
eff:
When your opponent activates a monster effect: Destroy 1 "Battlin' Boxer" or "Number" Xyz Monster you control, and if you do, negate the activation, and if you do that, destroy that monster, then you can apply the following effect.
● Special Summon 1 "Battlin' Boxer" Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck with a different name than the first monster, and if you do, attach this card to it as material.
You can only activate 1 "Battlin' Boxing Cross Counter" per turn.

action: Attaches itself from your field as Xyz Material
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
